disambiguation: This incident is not a benign autoscaler or CI burst because the event count (52) is significantly higher than typical autoscaling behavior, which usually does not exceed a few events in a short time. Additionally, the high novelty score of the principal suggests that this behavior is not part of its normal operational pattern.
key_evidence: 52 pod_create events detected in a short time frame (less than 22 seconds).
All events are associated with the same principal: system:serviceaccount:kube-system:replicaset-controller.
The events occurred within a single namespace: web.
The principal has a high novelty score (up to 958), indicating unusual behavior.
The risk score is high (0.6) and the risk band is classified as HIGH.
likely_intent: Resource hijacking through excessive pod creation.
recommended_guardrails: Implement resource quotas for pod creation in the web namespace.
Monitor and alert on unusual spikes in pod creation events.
Restrict permissions for the replicaset-controller service account to limit its ability to create pods.
